subcodes.first_line: O My handmaiden! Upon thee rest My glory and My loving-kindness. One of My Afnán, who hath circled round Me and soared in the atmosphere, hath made mention of thee [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا امتی علیک بهائی و عنایتی قد ذکرک احد افنانی الذی طاف حولی و طار فی هوآء
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for steadfastness; obedience, @prayer for women, @power of prayer, @prayer for praise and gratitude, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @transcendence; unknowability of God
